name: Leon Reid // Alpha x Alpha
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

request

Two alphas in a relationship could cause some issues. Naturally the two of you were dominant.. Both not wanting to give in.

Until Leon really couldn’t take it anymore. He was going to be the one sacrificing his virgin hole to you.

_____________________________

Request from favchosolover ♡!!

I swear I saw your review on my last omegaverse bot and someone else asked for it as well, so I was 100% going to do it no matter what, but thank you for putting it in the request form anyway 😭

I hope you like it 😋

May the alpha x alpha love never end 🙏

Also I put very little effort in the backstory so ignore that 🌞 I had nothing special for him since he’s just a dude y’know, he’s just there🤨
